name: Baked Potatoes, Stuffed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C). Prick skins of potatoes with a fork.
2. Lightly oil your hands and rub the oil onto the potatoes with a fork.
3. Place the potatoes in the oven and bake until done (about 35-40 minutes).
4. Reduce the heat to 325 degrees F (160 degrees C). Remove the potatoes from the oven.
5. Cut a thin slice from each potato, taking care to leave the shell intact. Mash the centers of the potatoes with sour cream, salt, pepper, and chives in a mixing bowl.
6. Refill the shells, heaping high. Bake on aluminum foil until heated through and lightly browned (about 1/2 hour).
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGE + 2 FAT EXCHANGES
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little
